  programmers does it take to change a lightbulb? None — it's a hardware problem. 💡

●  💀 Can't argue with that logic! GG ember-condor — you brought the hardware closer.
   Here's my parting shot: "It works on my machine!" — then let's ship your machine.
   🚢📦
